prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京理工大学在浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为约7885名→7126名→6338名→5498名→5501名，整体呈持续上升趋势（位次数字减小，竞争加剧），20 21至2024年累计前移约2387名；2024年与2025年基本持平，2025年基准位次约5501名；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划：2021年95人→2022年92人→2023年90人→202 4年85人→2025年85人→2026年85人，2024–2026年连续三年持平，无扩招或缩招，计划因素对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京理工大学为985工程、211工程、 双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升：2021年第19名→2022年第18名→2023年第16名→2024年第14名→2025年第13名→2026年第14名，稳居全国前15，属于顶尖理工类高 校，对高分考生吸引力强；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及师德师风事件（宫琳师德失范被开除等），但学校舆情应对较为高效，整体影响有限；抖音学校热度排名第47位，评价为较热，短视频平台有一定关注度；历史投档异常记录中未见北京理工大学有明显断档信号，报考心理稳定；第五轮学科评估中 ，信息与通信工程、控制科学与工程获评A+，光学工程、机械工程、材料科学与工程、管理科学与工程、计算机科学与技术获评A，力学、化学工程与技术、工商管理、数学、物 理学获评A-，A-及以上学科共12个，学科实力雄厚，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校在浙招生专业均为工科试验班大类，涵盖计算机、人工智能、电子信息、 自动化、机器人工程等2026年高热推荐方向（计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程均为高热推荐），专业热度持续升温；浙江省2026年普通高考考生总数约40万人（较2025年综 合类29.1万人大幅增加约37.6%），虽无分科数据，但浙江为综合改革省份，综合类考生占比极高，考生规模显著扩大将加剧整体竞争；北京理工大学位于北京 市，属一线城市高校，对浙江省考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在浙江省招生计划约占其全国总计划的一定比例，近年浙江计划稳定在85人，未出现明显的地域偏好变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移的强势走势、2026年招生计划持平、学校层次稳居全国前15、优势学科实力突出、招生专业均为高热方向，以及浙江省考生总数大幅增加带来的竞 争加剧，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准5501名基础上小幅后移（位次数字增大），预测最低位次约5531名，波动区间5031–6031名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次在5031–6031区间内，建议以二档（信息科学技术、徐特立英才班）为主攻方向，一档（卓越班、未来精工技术）作为冲刺，三档（电子信息实验班）作为稳妥保底。位 次明显优于区间下限（5031以内）可重点冲击一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（6031附近）应以三档为主确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Beijing Institute of Technology in Zhejiang Province's comprehensive category were approximately 7885 → 7126 → 6338 → 5498 → 5501, showing a continuous upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers, intensifying competition), with a cumulative advance of about 2387 places from 2021 to 2024; 2024 and 2025 were basically flat, with a baseline ranking of about 5501 in 2025; the enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Zhejiang Province: 95 in 2021 → 92 in 2022 → 90 in 2023 → 85 in 2024 → 85 in 2025 → 85 in 2026, remaining flat for three consecutive years from 2024 to 2026, with no expansion or reduction, and the plan factor has a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Institute of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been rising in recent years: 19th in 2021 → 18th in 2022 → 16th in 2023 → 14th in 2024 → 13th in 2025 → 14th in 2026, firmly in the top 15 nationally, belonging to top-tier science and engineering universities, with strong appeal to high-scoring candidates; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (Gong Lin's misconduct and dismissal), but the school's public relations response was relatively efficient, with limited overall impact; Douyin school popularity ranking is 47th, rated as relatively popular, with some attention on short video platforms; no obvious signal of a gap in historical application records for Beijing Institute of Technology, indicating stable application psychology; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Information and Communication Engineering, Control Science and Engineering were rated A+, Optical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology were rated A, Mechanics, Chemical Engineering and Technology, Business Administration, Mathematics, Physics were rated A-, with a total of 12 disciplines rated A- or above, demonstrating strong disciplinary strength, highly matched with the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The majors enrolled in Zhejiang are all engineering experimental classes, covering high-recommended directions for 2026 such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Electronic Information, Automation, Robotics Engineering (Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering are all high-recommended), with continuously rising major popularity; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Zhejiang Province in 2026 is about 400,000 (a significant increase of about 37.6% compared to 291,000 comprehensive candidates in 2025), although there is no subject-specific data, Zhejiang is a comprehensive reform province with a very high proportion of comprehensive candidates, and the significant expansion of the candidate pool will intensify overall competition; Beijing Institute of Technology is located in Beijing, a first-tier city university, with strong regional appeal to Zhejiang candidates; the enrollment plan in Zhejiang Province accounts for a certain proportion of the national total, and in recent years, the Zhejiang plan has been stable at 85, with no obvious changes in regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong upward trend of historical rankings, the flat enrollment plan in 2026, the school's stable position in the national top 15, outstanding advantages in disciplines, all enrollment majors being high-heat directions, and the intensified competition due to the significant increase in the number of candidates in Zhejiang Province, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly decline (ranking number increases) from the 2025 baseline of 5501, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 5531, and a fluctuation range of 5031–6031.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: With a predicted ranking in the 5031–6031 range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 (Information Science and Technology, Xu Teli Talent Class) as the main direction, Tier 1 (Excellence Class, Future Precision Engineering Technology) as a stretch, and Tier 3 (Electronic Information Experimental Class) as a safe backup. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 5031), focus on attacking Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 6031), prioritize Tier 3 to ensure admission.
